Main.paragraph1: Full-Stack Developer with a Bachelor's degree in Information Technology from Business and Technology University.
Main.paragraph2: I work with C# and ASP.NET Core for backend development and Angular for frontend applications. I have experience building RESTful APIs, working with Microsoft SQL Server and Oracle databases, and testing APIs using Postman. I focus on writing clean, maintainable code and continuously improving my technical skills. I am currently open to .NET or Full-Stack Developer opportunities where I can grow and contribute to real-world projects.
Main.paragraph3: Tech Stack: C#, .NET, ASP.NET Core, Angular, TypeScript, MS SQL Server, Oracle, REST APIs, Entity Framework, Git, Postman.
paragraph: Full-Stack Developer with a Bachelor's degree in Information Technology from Business and Technology University.

I work with C# and ASP.NET Core for backend development and use Angular to build frontend applications. I have experience designing and developing RESTful APIs, as well as working with Microsoft SQL Server and Oracle databases. I actively use Postman for API testing. I focus on writing clean, maintainable, and scalable code, and continuously work on improving my technical skills to build efficient and reliable web applications and APIs.
Tech Stack: C#, .NET, ASP.NET Core, Angular, TypeScript, MS SQL Server, Oracle, REST APIs, Entity Framework, Git, Postman.

RS.title: Revenue Service
li-paragraph: I developed full-stack applications using C#, .NET Entity Framework, and ASP.NET Core Web API for backend development.
I worked with Oracle Database for data management and optimization.
I built frontend features using Angular, HTML, CSS, and TypeScript.

GSES.title: Georgian State Electric System
li-paragraph: Provided support and maintenance for enterprise-level systems on both Windows Server and Linux platforms.
Managed and configured virtualization infrastructure using VMware vSphere, VMware vCenter, and VMware Workstation.
Administered and monitored email systems, including Microsoft Exchange Server and Barracuda Email Security Gateway.
Participated in routine system backups, updates, and security checks to ensure high availability and integrity of systems.

LexSport.title: LexSport Georgia
li-paragraph: Developed the official website using Angular and TypeScript.
Built a modern responsive UI for a sports law organization.
Structured the application using Angular components, routing, and modular architecture.
Implemented administrative functionality for creating and managing legal articles/news related to sports law.
Optimized the website for both desktop and mobile devices.

CommSchool.name: Tbilisi school of Communication
CommSchool.field: Participant in the „Do It in Georgia“ program – Tbilisi School of Communication, Back-end Development (C# & .NET)

Contact.title: Contact Me
Contact.subtitle: I’m open to work and collaboration. I would be happy to discuss your proposals 👇
